movie.title: Inside Out 2
movie.overview: Teenager Riley's mind headquarters is undergoing a sudden demolition to make room for new Emotions including Anxiety, Envy, Ennui and Embarrassment.

movie.title: Despicable Me 4
movie.overview: Gru and Lucy welcome a new member to the family, Gru Jr., who takes an instant dislike to his dad. Gru faces a new supervillain, Maxime Le Mal.

movie.title: Godzilla x Kong: The New Empire
movie.overview: Two ancient titans, Godzilla and Kong, clash in an epic battle as humans unravel their intertwined origins and connection to Skull Island's mysteries.

movie.title: Kingdom of the Planet of the Apes
movie.overview: Several generations after Caesar's reign, apes are now the dominant species while humans have been reduced to living in the shadows.

movie.title: A Quiet Place: Day One
movie.overview: A woman named Sam finds herself trapped in New York City during the terrifying alien invasion that started it all.

movie.title: Civil War
movie.overview: A team of military-embedded journalists race across a dystopian America to reach DC before rebel factions descend upon the White House.

movie.title: Atlas
movie.overview: A brilliant data analyst with a deep distrust of AI discovers it may be her only hope when a mission to capture a renegade robot goes awry.

movie.title: Kung Fu Panda 4
movie.overview: Po is gearing up to become the spiritual leader of his Valley of Peace, but also needs someone to take his place as Dragon Warrior.

movie.title: The Garfield Movie
movie.overview: Garfield, the world-famous Monday-hating lasagna-loving indoor cat, is about to have a wild outdoor adventure after reconnecting with his long-lost father.

movie.title: Road House
movie.overview: Ex-UFC fighter Dalton takes a job as a bouncer at a Florida Keys roadhouse, only to discover that this paradise is not what it seems.

movie.title: No Way Up
movie.overview: Characters from different walks of life are stranded in a sunken plane at the bottom of the Pacific Ocean.

movie.title: Society of the Snow
movie.overview: A Uruguayan rugby team's plane crashes into the remote Andes. Faced with extreme conditions, the survivors make desperate decisions to stay alive.

movie.title: Dune: Part Two
movie.overview: Paul Atreides unites with Chani and the Fremen while seeking revenge against the conspirators who destroyed his family.

movie.title: Furiosa: A Mad Max Saga
movie.overview: The origin story of renegade warrior Furiosa before she teamed up with Mad Max in the post-apocalyptic wasteland.

movie.title: Bad Boys: Ride or Die
movie.overview: Miami detectives Mike Lowrey and Marcus Burnett must go on the run after a drug cartel frames them and the now-deceased police captain Howard.

movie.title: Alien: Romulus
movie.overview: A group of young space colonizers come face to face with the most terrifying life form in the universe while scavenging an abandoned space station.

movie.title: The Fall Guy
movie.overview: A stuntman, fresh off an accident that sidelined him, returns to work on a movie where he uncovers a conspiracy.

movie.title: Imaginary
movie.overview: A woman returns to her childhood home and discovers that the imaginary friend she left behind is now terrorizing her stepchildren.

movie.title: Borderlands
movie.overview: A famous outlaw returns to her home planet and must form an alliance with a ragtag team of misfits to protect a young girl with mysterious powers.

movie.title: The Holdovers
movie.overview: A curmudgeonly instructor at a New England prep school is forced to remain on campus during the holidays with a troubled student who has no place to go.

movie.title: Alien: Romulus
movie.overview: Young colonizers face the most terrifying life form in the universe while exploring an abandoned space station between two worlds.

movie.title: Kalki 2898 AD
movie.overview: Set in a dystopian future in the year 2898 AD, the story connects ancient mythology with futuristic science fiction as the world awaits Kalki, the tenth avatar of Vishnu.

movie.title: Stree 2
movie.overview: The residents of Chanderi face a new supernatural terror. Vicky and friends must once again confront the unknown to protect their town from a mysterious evil.

movie.title: Devara: Part 1
movie.overview: A fearless man who ruled the seas and commanded respect through fear — and his son who must carry forward a legacy he barely understands.

movie.title: The Buckley Family Reunion
movie.overview: A family holiday reunion goes hilariously off the rails when secrets, old grudges and unexpected guests collide.

movie.title: Moana 2
movie.overview: Moana embarks on a new voyage alongside her crew, navigating the far seas of Oceania and into dangerous, long-lost waters for an adventure unlike anything she has ever faced before.

movie.title: Lee
movie.overview: The story of American photographer Elizabeth 'Lee' Miller, a fashion model who became an acclaimed war correspondent for Vogue magazine during World War II.

movie.title: Pushpa: The Rule – Part 2
movie.overview: Pushpa Raj continues to expand his red sandalwood smuggling empire while facing an intense rivalry with a powerful police officer determined to bring him down.

movie.title: Singham Again
movie.overview: Bajirao Singham embarks on a mission to rescue his wife, aided by a team of police officers in an epic battle between good and evil.

movie.title: Moana 2
movie.overview: Moana receives an unexpected call from her wayfinding ancestors and must journey to the far seas of Oceania and into dangerous, long-lost waters.
